headline: DaVita (DVA) Stock After 82% YTD Surge Is The Price Still Justified
summary: For investors wondering whether DaVita at around US$208.66 is offering fair value or trading at a stretched price, this article walks through what the numbers are really saying about the stock. The stock has returned 8.6% over the past week, 4.5% over the last month, 82.2% year to date and 53.3% over the past year, which has put its recent performance firmly on investors' radar. Recent attention around DaVita has largely centred on its role in the US healthcare sector and on how the market...
